message:
chore(engine): add inline artifact capture to RGC script and schema versions to planning track

Add sentinel-based inline artifact extraction to the JSON stringify
compound traversal script, enabling remote execution via rch to
transport artifacts within stdout instead of requiring filesystem
access. Add schema_version fields to rgc_planning_track_v1.json
source contract entries for machine-readable identification.
Update beads issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -10,27 +10,31 @@

@@ -23,6 +23,9 @@ replay_command="./scripts/e2e/rgc_json_stringify_compound_traversal_replay.sh ${
 
 export RGC_JSON_STRINGIFY_COMPOUND_TRAVERSAL_ARTIFACT_DIR="${run_dir}"
 
+inline_artifact_begin="__RGC_JSON_STRINGIFY_ARTIFACT_BEGIN__:"
+inline_artifact_end="__RGC_JSON_STRINGIFY_ARTIFACT_END__:"
+
 mkdir -p "${run_dir}"
 
 if ! command -v rch >/dev/null 2>&1; then
@@ -36,6 +39,7 @@ run_rch() {
     "RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=${toolchain}" \
     "CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${target_dir}" \
     "RGC_JSON_STRINGIFY_COMPOUND_TRAVERSAL_ARTIFACT_DIR=${run_dir}" \
+    "RGC_JSON_STRINGIFY_COMPOUND_TRAVERSAL_INLINE_ARTIFACTS=1" \
     "$@"
 }
 
@@ -112,6 +116,96 @@ run_step() {
   fi
 }
 
+print_log_without_inline_artifacts() {
+  local log_path="$1"
+  awk \
+    -v begin="${inline_artifact_begin}" \
+    -v end="${inline_artifact_end}" \
+    'index($0, begin) { skip = 1; next } index($0, end) { skip = 0; next } !skip { print }' \
+    "${log_path}"
+}
+
+extract_inline_artifacts_to_run_dir() {
+  local log_path="$1"
+  local line current_path found_any
+
+  found_any=0
+  current_path=""
+  mkdir -p "${run_dir}"
+
+  while IFS= read -r line || [[ -n "${line}" ]]; do
+    if [[ "${line}" == "${inline_artifact_begin}"* ]]; then
+      current_path="${line#${inline_artifact_begin}}"
+      mkdir -p "$(dirname "${run_dir}/${current_path}")"
+      : >"${run_dir}/${current_path}"
+      found_any=1
+      continue
+    fi
+
+    if [[ "${line}" == "${inline_artifact_end}"* ]]; then
+      current_path=""
+      continue
+    fi
+
+    if [[ -n "${current_path}" ]]; then
+      printf '%s\n' "${line}" >>"${run_dir}/${current_path}"
+    fi
+  done <"${log_path}"
+
+  if [[ "${found_any}" -eq 0 ]]; then
+    echo "missing inline artifact capture for ${run_dir}" >&2
+    return 1
+  fi
+}
+
+run_test_step_with_artifacts() {
+  local command_text="$1"
+  local log_path status remote_exit_code
+
+  echo "==> ${command_text}"
+  log_path="$(mktemp)"
+
+  set +e
+  run_rch \
+    cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test stdlib_integration \
+    json_stringify_compound_traversal_scenario_emits_artifact_bundle -- --exact --nocapture \
+    >"${log_path}" 2>&1
+  status=$?
+  set -e
+
+  print_log_without_inline_artifacts "${log_path}"
+
+  if ! rch_reject_local_fallback "${log_path}"; then
+    rm -f "${log_path}"
+    return 1
+  fi
+
+  if [[ "${status}" -ne 0 ]]; then
+    if rch_recovered_success "${log_path}"; then
+      echo "==> recovered: remote execution succeeded; artifact retrieval timed out"
+    else
+      remote_exit_code="$(rch_remote_exit_code "${log_path}" || true)"
+      rm -f "${log_path}"
+      if [[ -n "${remote_exit_code}" ]]; then
+        echo "rch command failed: ${command_text} (rch-exit=${status}; remote-exit=${remote_exit_code})" >&2
+      else
+        echo "rch command failed: ${command_text} (rch-exit=${status}; missing-remote-exit-marker)" >&2
+      fi
+      return 1
+    fi
+  fi
+
+  remote_exit_code="$(rch_remote_exit_code "${log_path}" || true)"
+  if [[ -z "${remote_exit_code}" || "${remote_exit_code}" != "0" ]]; then
+    rm -f "${log_path}"
+    echo "rch remote exit marker missing or non-zero for: ${command_text}" >&2
+    return 1
+  fi
+
+  extract_inline_artifacts_to_run_dir "${log_path}"
+  rm -f "${log_path}"
+}
+
 run_mode() {
   case "${mode}" in
     check)
@@ -120,27 +214,24 @@ run_mode() {
         cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test stdlib_integration
       ;;
     test)
-      run_step \
+      run_test_step_with_artifacts \
         "cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test stdlib_integration json_stringify_compound_traversal_scenario_emits_artifact_bundle -- --exact --nocapture" \
-        cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test stdlib_integration json_stringify_compound_traversal_scenario_emits_artifact_bundle -- --exact --nocapture
       ;;
     clippy)
       run_step \
         "cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test stdlib_integration -- -D warnings" \
         cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test stdlib_integration -- -D warnings
       ;;
     replay)
-      run_step \
+      run_test_step_with_artifacts \
         "cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test stdlib_integration json_stringify_compound_traversal_scenario_emits_artifact_bundle -- --exact --nocapture" \
-        cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test stdlib_integration json_stringify_compound_traversal_scenario_emits_artifact_bundle -- --exact --nocapture
       ;;
     ci)
       run_step \
         "cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test stdlib_integration" \
         cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test stdlib_integration
-      run_step \
+      run_test_step_with_artifacts \
         "cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test stdlib_integration json_stringify_compound_traversal_scenario_emits_artifact_bundle -- --exact --nocapture" \
-        cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test stdlib_integration json_stringify_compound_traversal_scenario_emits_artifact_bundle -- --exact --nocapture
       run_step \
         "cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test stdlib_integration -- -D warnings" \
         cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test stdlib_integration -- -D warnings
